# Lockscreen Todo

> Turn your Notion to-do list into a phone lock screen wallpaper. Free, read-only OAuth, no app install.

## What is it

Lockscreen Todo is a small web app that pulls your tasks from a Notion database and renders them as a lock screen wallpaper for iPhone or Android.

It does not require installing a new app. You connect your Notion once, pick the tasks you want, and the app generates a JPG that you save to Photos and set as your lock screen. The next time you glance at your phone, your tasks are already there.

It was built for people who already manage their life in Notion but find that Notion's app is not visible enough — the lock screen is visible 50-150 times per day, while a task app is only opened 4-10 times.

## Who it is for

- Notion power users whose tasks live in a Notion database with a `Due date` column.
- People with ADHD, students, caregivers, and habit builders who use Notion as a GTD-style daily agenda.
- Anyone who wants a friction-free daily reminder without installing a new app.

## How it works

1. Sign in with Notion (OAuth, read-only).
2. Pick which Notion database holds your tasks.
3. The app imports tasks due today (or tomorrow as fallback) and renders them onto a wallpaper.
4. Save the JPG to Photos and set it as your lock screen.

## Key features

- Notion OAuth integration (read-only, official).
- Smart date filter: today's tasks by default, tomorrow as fallback.
- No app install — works in the browser, exports JPG/PNG.
- Private: tasks are not stored, Notion stays the source of truth.
- Free preview with sample data; Pro plan removes watermark.
- iPhone and Android compatible.
- Multilingual: English and Simplified Chinese.

- [Home](https://lockscreentodo.com/en): main landing page

- [Lock screen vs widget comparison](https://lockscreentodo.com/en/lock-screen-widget-vs-wallpaper): comparison

## Pricing

Free preview with sample tasks. Pro plan removes the watermark and unlocks unlimited generations.

## Privacy

- Notion OAuth scope is read-only.
- Tasks are not stored in any database.
- The Notion token is stored encrypted in Supabase and used only to fetch your tasks at the moment you click "Generate".

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/rayvin1990
- Notion integration: https://www.notion.com/integrations/lockscreen-todo
- Twitter / X: @lockscreentodo
